name: codex-session-context
description: Keep an agent's effective inputs recoverable across context compression and parent-to-child task handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent inputs recoverable across context boundaries.
interface.longDescription: Preserves an agent's effective inputs across context boundaries. It reconstructs working context after compression from local Codex session history. For parent-to-child handoff, the parent publishes a complete task and the child retrieves it as agent input, which then remains available through the same session recovery workflow.
defaultPrompt: Recover this agent's working context after compression.
Publish a complete task input for a sub-agent.
